name: publicWeb_getLandingPageData
description: Returns kennel identity and website configuration needed to render a public-web landing page. Looked up by KennelUniqueShortName (URL slug). No authentication required. Style columns return NULL when the kennel has no KennelWebsite row — the frontend applies its own platform defaults. The FILTH-kennel fallback that existed in v1.0.0 has been removed; style defaults are now hardcoded in the SP so FILTH kennel changes cannot affect other kennels.

parameters.name: kennelUniqueShortName
parameters.description: The kennel's URL slug — must match exactly (case-insensitive collation applies at DB level)

rowsets.name: KennelLandingPage
rowsets.description: Single row when the kennel is found and publicly visible. Empty rowset (0 rows) when not found or inactive — the caller must treat this as a 404.

columns.name: PublicKennelId
columns.description: Public kennel GUID. Safe to expose — used by subsequent public-web SPs (e.g. publicWeb_getEvents) that take a GUID key instead of the URL slug.

columns.name: KennelName
columns.description: Full kennel name (e.g. 'London Hash House Harriers')

columns.name: KennelShortName
columns.description: Display short name (e.g. 'LH3')

columns.name: KennelUniqueShortName
columns.description: URL slug — echoed back from input so the caller can confirm the match

columns.name: KennelDescription
columns.description: Free-text description of the kennel. NULL when not set.

columns.name: KennelLogo
columns.description: Logo URL from HC.Kennel.KennelLogo. NOT NULL — but may be a bundle:// ref (e.g. 'bundle://defaultKennelLogo') for kennels that have not uploaded a logo. Callers must check for an https:// prefix before rendering as an image.

columns.name: FaviconUrl
columns.description: Favicon URL from HC.Kennel.KennelFavicon. NULL when not set. Callers must check for https:// prefix.

columns.name: BannerImage
columns.description: Hero/header banner image URL from KennelWebsite.BannerImage. NULL when not set.

columns.name: WebsiteBackgroundImage
columns.description: Background image URL from KennelWebsite.BackgroundImage. NULL when not set — frontend uses the platform default tile in that case. Not inherited from FILTH.

columns.name: ThemeMode
columns.description: Theme mode for the kennel website: 'light' or 'dark'. Defaults to 'dark' when not configured.

columns.name: PrimaryColor
columns.description: CSS hex primary brand colour (e.g. '#dc2626'). Injected as --color-primary. NULL when not configured.

columns.name: AccentColor
columns.description: CSS hex accent colour. Injected as --color-accent; falls back to PrimaryColor in the frontend when NULL.

columns.name: ScrollBlur
columns.description: Scroll blur intensity: 0 = no blur, 100 = full blur (40px CSS blur — image detail completely obscured). Defaults to 0 when not configured. Full blur is reached when the hero logo has faded out, not at bottom of page.

columns.name: OgImageUrl
columns.description: Open Graph image URL (1200×630px recommended). Used when pages are shared on social/messaging. NULL when not set.

columns.name: WebsiteTitleText
columns.description: Custom display name shown in the hero below the logo. COALESCE(KennelWebsite.TitleText, Kennel.KennelName) — always non-null.

columns.name: Tagline
columns.description: Short strapline. COALESCE(KennelWebsite.Tagline, 'A Drinking Club with a Running Problem') — always non-null.

columns.name: WelcomeText
columns.description: Homepage welcome/intro copy. COALESCE(KennelWebsite.WelcomeText, hardcoded platform default) — always non-null.

columns.name: SeoTitle
columns.description: Per-tenant <title> tag override. NULL when not set — caller constructs a default title from KennelName.

columns.name: SeoDescription
columns.description: Per-tenant <meta description>. NULL when not set.

columns.name: SeoStructuredDataJson
columns.description: JSON-LD structured data override. NULL when not set — caller generates a default from kennel identity fields.

columns.name: CustomDomain
columns.description: Tier 3 custom domain (e.g. 'lh3.com'). NULL = subdomain-only kennel (tier 2).

columns.name: WebsiteEnabled
columns.description: Whether the HC6 public website is enabled for this kennel. NULL when no KennelWebsite row exists.

columns.name: WebsiteBackgroundColor
columns.description: HC5 legacy background colour. Superseded by PrimaryColor + ThemeMode in HC6. Retained for migration completeness.

columns.name: MenuBackgroundColor
columns.description: HC5 legacy menu background colour. Superseded by HC6 theming.

columns.name: MenuTextColor
columns.description: HC5 legacy menu text colour. Superseded by HC6 theming.

columns.name: BodyTextColor
columns.description: HC5 legacy body text colour. Superseded by HC6 theming.

columns.name: TitleTextColor
columns.description: HC5 legacy title text colour. Used for the hero TitleText when set.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change ThemeMode values without updating all frontend theme consumers
Never change ScrollBlur range (0–100) without updating the frontend mapping
